data.description:
## Why
The auto-lander needs an opt-in, machine-readable "please land this" intent that agents set and the bot consumes as a lease. Under Fast-Forward-Only `main` (ADR-0040) the label must be **non-gating** (FFO already enforces up-to-date, so gating would be redundant and add a wedge) and **non-sticky** (it is about the current tip). Research (GerriScary/CVE-2025-1568) requires a tight vote ACL.
## What
Author an `Autosubmit` Gerrit label in `infra/gerrit/project.config` and apply it to live `refs/meta/config` (operator cutover — detect-only under ADR-0026). Bot-only vote ACL; `function = NoBlock`; empty `copyCondition`.
## Scope
Config + ACL + cutover ONLY. The service that reads the label is a separate story.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `Autosubmit` label added to `infra/gerrit/project.config` (`-1..+1`, `function = NoBlock`, empty `copyCondition` so it drops on every new patchset).
- [ ] `label-Autosubmit` vote ACL restricted to the auto-lander bot account (+ Administrators); ordinary users and `addPatchSet` cannot forge it.
- [ ] Label is NOT referenced by any submit requirement (non-gating; FFO enforces up-to-date structurally).
- [ ] `config-check` passes; live cutover applied to `refs/meta/config` and verified via `GET /projects/rebar/labels/Autosubmit`.
- [ ] Security review: the label cannot weaken the two-vote (`LLM-Review`+`Verified`) gate.
data.title: S1 Autosubmit label + ACLs (project.config + refs/meta/config cutover)
